description_long: This structure is a large, urban dam-like object featuring a central vertical wall made of brick and concrete, with a wide, curved surface resembling a skate ramp or spillway. The top of the dam is bordered by red metal safety railings, and there is a prominent staircase and platform on one side, constructed from wood and metal, providing access to the upper level. The main surface is tiled with light-colored panels and decorated with bold, black graffiti art, including stylized words and symbols. The central section of the dam has a large rectangular opening, possibly for water passage or maintenance access. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with a mix of industrial and urban aesthetic elements.
description: A large, brick and concrete dam structure with a curved, tiled surface, red railings, graffiti art, and a side staircase with a wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brick wall base, central opening, tiled curved surface, red railings, and graffiti on the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the interior curved surface, graffiti art, and the full staircase and platform on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the dam, the large graffiti on the curved surface, and the wooden staircase structure on the right.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the curved tiled surface, graffiti, and the staircase and platform structure.
